name: Conjunction
natal_definition: Identity-fusion of all planets; the chart's overall focus and unity (Addey/Cochrane). Vedic D1 = master life template.
transit_definition: Direct union / arrival; planet enters the same field of expression.
harmony_definition: Monad, unity, the undivided source (Addey).

name: Opposition
natal_definition: Polarity, confrontation, mirroring. 'Inclines toward relating to others because of polarizing and objectifying tendencies' (Cochrane/Godefrey). Vedic D2 Hora = wealth.
transit_definition: Face-off, full-moon tension demanding integration.
harmony_definition: Duality, dialectic, the Other (Hamblin).

name: Trine
natal_definition: Natural talent, easy flow. 'A naturalness and smoothness... as if planets are on ice and slide towards their destination' (Brady/Cochrane). Vedic D3 Drekkana = siblings, courage.
transit_definition: Lubrication, smooth opportunity; can slide toward indulgence (Brady).
harmony_definition: Equilibrium, gestalt, the harmonious triangle (Hamblin).

name: Square
natal_definition: 'Shows how we deal with stress, strain, and struggle' (Marks). 'Basic challenges and things the person wishes to achieve' (Cochrane). Vedic D4 Chaturthamsa = property, fortune.
transit_definition: Crisis-in-action, call for decision, structural pressure.
harmony_definition: Matter, the cross, four-element manifestation (Addey).

name: Quintile
natal_definition: 'Making, arranging, building, constructing, structuring, forming' (Addey/Hamblin). 'Fascination and playful enjoyment of curved, non-linear, lively forms' (Cochrane 2012).
transit_definition: Bursts of creative shaping; opportunities to impose form on chaos.
harmony_definition: The pentagon, the golden ratio, conscious will and creative form (Addey).

name: Sextile
natal_definition: 'Rhythmic activity and the practice of art' (Addey). 'Pleasant and easy sharing with others' (Cochrane). Productive practice of gifts.
transit_definition: Easy opportunity requiring small initiative; pleasant exchange.
harmony_definition: Outward expression of joy, communicative flow — 3 made manifest through 2 (Hamblin).

name: Septile
natal_definition: 'Man's highest flights of creative imagination, and his lowest depths of destructive illusion' (Hamblin). Fated unconscious compulsion, inspiration. Rudhyar: 'acts compelled by a collective need, an occult power or fate.'
transit_definition: Fated encounters, synchronicities, providence; 'Deus ex machina' timing.
harmony_definition: 'A romantic number — not of permanence but of transience; not of truth but of sudden flashes of light and darkness' (Hamblin).

name: Semi-square / Octile
natal_definition: 'Hard aspect, motivating. Inner need or drive' (Cochrane). Primary Uranian/Cosmobiology dial — friction drives concrete action (Ebertin).
transit_definition: The prod, the goad; small but persistent friction demanding response.
harmony_definition: Doubled cross — material struggle intensified into productive action (Ebertin/Cochrane).

name: Novile
natal_definition: 'Capacity for joy and happiness... the fruit of one's labour' (Hamblin/Addey). 'The chart of the soul mate and the soul itself' (Jay). Vedic D9 Navamsa = marriage, dharma, fruit of all planetary promises.
transit_definition: Initiation, ripening; the fruit dropping from the tree (Portman/Jay).
harmony_definition: 3³, perfection of threeness, completion of a cycle (Hamblin/Addey).

name: Decile / Semi-quintile
natal_definition: 'Small creative aspect; helps transmute idea into concrete form. Common among reformers' (Cochrane/Godefrey). Vedic D10 Dasamsa = career, public standing.
transit_definition: Opportunities to publicize; creative idea reaching the marketplace.
harmony_definition: Completeness of form (Pythagorean decad) — creative power integrated with relational reality.

name: Undecile
natal_definition: 'Excess, double-binds; deep internal longing, steadily burning obsessive dream' (Hamblin/Seymour-Smith). 'Innovative and impatient, inclined to music and dance' (Cochrane).
transit_definition: Restlessness, unable to sit still, hungering for novelty.
harmony_definition: First prime beyond the duodecimal grid — the irruption of the new (Hamblin).

name: Semi-sextile / Dodecile
natal_definition: 'Combines soft (3) and hard (4). Basic resources available to the person' (Cochrane). Vedic D12 Dwadasamsa = parents, ancestry.
transit_definition: Subtle adjustment, the quincunx's either/or choice.
harmony_definition: Zodiacal completeness, the ancestral framework (3 × 4) (Cochrane/Hamblin).

name: Tredecile
natal_definition: 'The one among the twelve, suggests lordship' (Addey). 'Death and rebirth, transformation; sense of mission and purpose, feeling one must achieve something great or unique' (Marks/Godefrey). Ubiquitous in charts of geniuses (Partha).
transit_definition: Rupture and rebirth events; transformative encounters.
harmony_definition: The thirteenth — lordship over the duodecimal whole; Scorpionic resonance (Addey).

name: Quattuordecile
natal_definition: 'Shared sense of inner discipline and focus' (Cochrane). Septile inspiration (7) pressure-tested by duality (2) — mysticism made socially functional.
transit_definition: Brief tests of spiritual/creative discipline.
harmony_definition: Fated discipline — 7 doubled and confronted (Cochrane).

name: Quindecile (H15, 24°)
natal_definition: 'Facility and ease in expressing oneself creatively' (Cochrane). NOTE: Tyl/Reeves use 'quindecile' for H24 (165°) — 'obsession, disruption, upheaval' — a separate aspect; naming dispute flagged by Holden.
transit_definition: Creative breakthroughs that flow naturally (H15); obsessive push if using Tyl/Reeves 165° convention.
harmony_definition: 3 × 5 — ease in form-making, creative grace (Cochrane).

name: Sixteenth / Semi-octile
natal_definition: 'Hard aspects that motivate or stress; inner motivation not conspicuous from casual observation' (Cochrane/Uranian). 'Maximum concrete manifestation; open conflict from separateness' (Hamblin/Orr).
transit_definition: Pivotal stress points; separateness; dramatic effort.
harmony_definition: 2⁴ — maximum doubling of the cross; the unconscious cross (Cochrane/Uranian).

name: Septendecile
natal_definition: 'Non-linear way of thinking conducive to success in arts and literature. Acting and theatre often strong interests' (Cochrane). Those with strong H17 'are not consistently available to others.'
transit_definition: Encounters asking you to inhabit another's story; theatrical empathy activated.
harmony_definition: Irreducible prime — non-linear narrative consciousness (Cochrane vibrational research).

name: Vigintile
natal_definition: 'Strong need to be part of a positive and harmonious community, to participate as an appreciated and respected member' (Cochrane). Dobyns: opposition in the 9th harmonic — struggle to attain enlightenment.
transit_definition: Tests of one's spiritual community; struggle to live one's bliss.
harmony_definition: 2 × 9 — joy of completion externalized/confronted (Cochrane/Dobyns).

name: Novendecile
natal_definition: 'Inclined to arts, literature, humanities; very abstract and cerebral... motivations can be difficult for more earth-bound minds to grasp' (Cochrane). Slightly more Mercurial than H17.
transit_definition: Ideas reorganized intellectually; abstract creative reconfiguration.
harmony_definition: Prime — abstract narrative reasoning; cerebral re-configuration (Cochrane).

name: Semidecile / Vimsamsa
natal_definition: 'Need to create things and work in a creative way; becomes easily bored by repetitive tasks' (Cochrane). Vedic D20 Vimsamsa = spiritual practices, upasana, religious devotion.
transit_definition: Bursts of creative production; spiritual practice deepening.
harmony_definition: 4 × 5 — creativity pressure-tested and made productive (Cochrane/BPHS).

name: Henavigintile
natal_definition: 'Good focus and discipline; ability to develop excellent technique. Natural flow in a rigorous discipline; maturity and classical methods' (Cochrane). 7 × 3 = septile discipline + trine ease.
transit_definition: Technical breakthroughs in disciplined work.
harmony_definition: Disciplined craft — the master-apprentice resonance (Cochrane).

name: Duovigintile
natal_definition: 'Restlessness, impatience, tendency to feel stifled by others' (Cochrane). 2 × 11 — the 11th harmonic's excess externalized into chafing against others.
transit_definition: Feeling smothered; wanting out.
harmony_definition: Amplified Uranian excess — eleven doubled (Cochrane).

name: Trevigintile
natal_definition: 'Abstract thinking and interest in offbeat or unusual topics. Likes to try out unusual or novel configurations' (Cochrane — speculative caveat given).
transit_definition: Encounter with unusual ideas or people.
harmony_definition: Prime — experimental novelty; first reconfiguration prime beyond 19 (Cochrane).

name: Quattuorvigintile / Siddhamsa
natal_definition: '11/24 aspect: unrelenting headstrong determination, disruption, upheaval; obsessive-compulsive' (Cochrane/Reeves/Tyl). Vedic D24 Chaturvimsamsa = education, intellectual achievement.
transit_definition: 'Bandit in the transit' — sudden obsessive push (Reeves/Tyl).
harmony_definition: 8 × 3 — pressured will meeting flow; the fatal-in-the-natal (Tyl/Reeves/Cochrane).

name: Quinvigintile
natal_definition: 'Exceptionally creative tendency; builds things outside usual accepted ways' (Cochrane/Hamblin). 5² — quintile doubled. Hamblin/Orr: prominent in charts of doctors.
transit_definition: Innovative creative outputs; unconventional professional breakthroughs.
harmony_definition: 5² — pure fiveness squared; the architect of forms (Cochrane/Hamblin).

name: Sexvigintile
natal_definition: 'Competitive drive, distaste for mediocre results. Overwhelming need to break through to new level of accomplishment' (Cochrane). 2 × 13 — Scorpionic transformation made interpersonal.
transit_definition: Confrontation with one's standards; push to break through.
harmony_definition: Amplified transformational ambition (Cochrane).

name: Septemvigintile / Bhamsa
natal_definition: 'Deep need for peace and comfort. Strong pacifist tendency; becomes ill or distraught in inharmonious atmosphere' (Cochrane). Vedic D27 = character strengths and weaknesses.
transit_definition: Need for retreat, restoration, peaceful withdrawal.
harmony_definition: 3³ — highest octave of trine-ease and pacifist joy (Cochrane/BPHS).

name: Octovigintile
natal_definition: 'Need for discipline and focus; tendency to feel stress and constrained. Intense focus to release tension' (Cochrane). 4 × 7 — septile inspiration meeting square-tension.
transit_definition: Tightening focus accompanied by anxiety.
harmony_definition: Amplified fated discipline — 7 squared with structural pressure (Cochrane).

name: Novemvigintile
natal_definition: 'Interest in abstract ideas and unusual subjects; seeks alternative paradigms; constructive view that there are options to improve situations' (Cochrane). 'Can win people's hearts' (Cochrane class).
transit_definition: Encounter with worldview-altering ideas.
harmony_definition: Prime — constructive paradigm reconfiguration; the optimistic innovator (Cochrane).

name: Trigintile / Trimsamsa
natal_definition: 'Good sensitivity and awareness of different styles; creates things others find comfortable and aesthetically pleasing' (Cochrane). Vedic D30 Trimsamsa = misfortunes and evils to overcome — the karmic stress chart.
transit_definition: Aesthetic encounters, tests of taste; karmic stress surfaces.
harmony_definition: 2 × 3 × 5 — full triadic synthesis of pressure, flow, and form (Cochrane/BPHS).

name: Unotrigintile
natal_definition: 'Highly abstract ideas; sensitive to limits in philosophies and traditions; drawn to contradictions and enigmas that cannot be fully grasped; longing for a unifying paradigm' (Cochrane — speculative).
transit_definition: Encounter with the boundary of knowledge.
harmony_definition: Prime — meta-systems awareness; the felt limit of every framework (Cochrane).

name: Duotrigintile
natal_definition: 'Inner drives, talents, and motivations' (Cochrane). 2⁵ — Uranian/Cosmobiology 32nd-dial: deep subliminal drive.
transit_definition: Subtle inner urging; deep instinctual motivation.
harmony_definition: Maximum doubling (2⁵) — the unconscious cross; subliminal Mars-like push (Cochrane/Uranian).

name: Tretrigintile
natal_definition: 3 × 11: ease (3) channelling Uranian excess (11). Visionary creative facility — unusual ideas arriving with natural grace.
transit_definition: An idea breaks the mold but flows without effort.
harmony_definition: Graceful Uranian inspiration; trine of the visionary (Hamblin family rules).

name: Quattuortrigintile
natal_definition: 2 × 17: H17's narrative reconfiguration pressure-tested. Dramatic storytelling under tension; theatrical empathy made concrete.
transit_definition: A story-arc gets stress-tested; empathy encounters friction.
harmony_definition: Confronted narrative consciousness — H17 doubled and externalized.

name: Quintrigintile
natal_definition: 5 × 7: rare convergence of quintile-craft and septile-fate. The inspired craftsman — work that carries destiny in it. Hamblin: 5 and 7 form the most numinous creative combination.
transit_definition: Inspired creative breakthroughs with a destiny-quality.
harmony_definition: Fated form-making — the sacred artist's resonance (Hamblin family principle).

natal_definition: 4 × 9 = 6²: integrated joy made manifest in concrete form; mature dharma; Hamblin/Schubert-Weller key signature. Decan boundary (10° = 1/36 of chart).
transit_definition: Completion of a developmental cycle; joyful manifestation.
harmony_definition: 6² — the squared sextile of joyful exchange; doubled harmony (Astrodienst/Hamblin).
